mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : LessonScheduleDAO.list 설 명 : 강의실 학습주차 목록 조회 */
ORDER BY A.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : LessonScheduleDAO.updateLbnTm 설 명 : 강의실 주차 학습시간 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL A JOIN ( SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , NVL(SUM(C.RCMD_ATNDLC_MNTS), 0) AS LCTR_TOC_LRN_SCNDS FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM B ON A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS C ON B.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = C.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND C.PRG_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND ( C.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD = 'VIDEO' OR ( C.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD = 'VIDEO_LINK' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_PAGE WHERE SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = C.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID ) ) ) WHERE A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId} GROUP BY A.SBJCT_ID, A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID ) B ON A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID SET A.MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId} , A.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() , A.LCTR_TOC_LRN_SCNDS = B.LCTR_TOC_LRN_SCNDS WHERE A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId} AND A.LCTR_TOC_LRN_SCNDS != B.LCTR_TOC_LRN_SCNDS
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : LessonScheduleDAO.selectLessonScheduleAll 설 명 : 주차, 교시, 강의컨텐츠 조회 */
ORDER BY A.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ, B.LCTR_CLASTM_SEQ, C.LCTR_CONTS_SEQ

/* SQL ID : LessonScheduleDAO.listLessonScheduleAll 설 명 : 주차, 교시, 강의컨텐츠 목록 조회 */
ORDER BY A.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ, B.LCTR_CLASTM_SEQ, C.LCTR_CONTS_SEQ

/* SQL ID : LessonScheduleDAO.countLessonScheduleCnts 설 명 : 주차 학습콘텐츠 수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM B ON A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS C ON B.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = C.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId}

/* SQL ID : LessonScheduleDAO.listLessonScheduleForTrans 설 명 : 주차 목록 조회(선수강과목 이관용) */ SELECT LCTR_SCHDL_ID , SBJCT_ID , LCTR_SCHDLNM , LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ , LCTR_TYCD , LCTR_GOAL , LCTR_OTLN , LCTR_REF_DATA , LCTR_SYMD , LCTR_EYMD , LCTR_RCG_SYMD , LCTR_RCG_EYMD , OYN , LCTR_TOC_LRN_SCNDS , LCTR_NOTE , LCTR_NOTE_PVSNYN , LCTR_WKNO_GBNCD , DELYN , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}
